items.title: Rust-proof your code with our new Testing Handbook chapter
items.summary: We’ve added a new chapter to our Testing Handbook: a comprehensive guide to security testing Rust programs. This chapter covers the tools and techniques we use at Trail of Bits to validate the security of Rust programs and systems. fn main() {(|f:&dyn Fn(u128)->Box< dyn Iterator<

items.title: GPT-5.5-Cyber built a zlib fuzzing lab in a day
items.summary: We’re running Patch the Planet, an ongoing collaboration with OpenAI that pairs Trail of Bits engineers directly with more than 30 open-source projects. Its goal is to front-run a serious problem facing open-source maintainers: highly capable models like GPT-5.5-Cyber will soon c

items.title: President Trump expected to meet with senators to work on ethics concerns in crypto bill
items.summary: The most contentious piece of the crypto market structure bill is unresolved in the final weeks of Senate runway, and the president is expected to discuss it.

items.title: Crypto firms face AML risks during post-MiCA migration, says AMLA chair
items.summary: AMLA is expanding its crypto oversight as firms complete the transition to the EU’s MiCA licensing regime.

items.title: Bitcoin gets new $80K August target: Watch these BTC price levels next
items.summary: BTC price upside predictions include $68,000 within two weeks and up to $80,000 next month, contrasting with warnings of a 2022 bear-market rerun for the rest of 2026.

items.title: Mutation testing comes to DAML
items.summary: In April we released Mewt, our open-source mutation-testing engine that finds the gaps in your test suite. Today we’re expanding it with support for DAML, the language Canton Network applications are written in. Mewt now reads DAML, generates several classes of mutants (including

items.title: Live updates: ZachXBT calls hardware wallets complete garbage; BTC steady after Korea rate hike
items.summary: Blockchain investigator ZachXBT came down heavily on hardware wallets. BTC traded steady near $65,000 after South Korea's rate hike.

items.title: U.S. Senate unanimously opposes clemency for FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried
items.summary: The nonbinding resolution passed without objection after Bankman-Fried asked for clemency, months after Trump pardoned other major crypto figures, including Changpeng Zhao and Ross Ulbricht.

items.title: A bitcoin wallet dormant since the 2017 peak just moved $383 million
items.summary: The coins went to a fresh address rather than an exchange, so nothing has been sold yet.

items.title: Ether outruns bitcoin as ETF money returns, almost all of from BlackRock's fund
items.summary: This is not a broad rally as bitcoin is up 4% over the same stretch, and solana, TRON and hyperliquid are all lower.

items.title: Two groups of bitcoin investors sell on the rise as U.S. inflation lifts prices to nearly $65,000
items.summary: Bitcoin surges toward $65,000 on softer-than-expected inflation data, but on-chain signals show two key investor groups selling into the bounce.

items.title: Tether invests $20M into Argentine neobank Ualá
items.summary: Tether reportedly invested $20 million into Ualá, as part of the Argentine neobank’s $197 million funding round announced earlier in March.

items.title: Bitcoin $107K buyers providing ‘early signals’ of 2026 bear-market bottom: Glassnode
items.summary: Bitcoin realized losses appeared to be copying a reversal structure that marked previous bear-market bottoms, with $69,000 a new BTC price battleground.

items.title: Robinhood Chain memecoin launchpad Vlad.fun halts after ‘internal integrity’ issue
items.summary: Vlad.fun suspended its platform after discovering a “serious internal integrity issue” involving members of its team, without disclosing the nature of the alleged misconduct.

items.title: Hyperion DeFi to deploy 500K HYPE for Hyperliquid HIP-3 markets
items.summary: The deal gives Hyperion an equity stake in Skew and a share of listing-service revenue as it expands the utility of its HYPE treasury assets.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Trump to meet with senators over CLARITY Act on Thursday: Politico
items.summary: US President Donald Trump is set to meet with several senators on Thursday as negotiators race to get the CLARITY Act across the line before the Senate’s August recess.

items.title: Base’s social bet left it trailing in prediction markets and perps: Pollak
items.summary: Base creator Jesse Pollak is stepping back from leadership of the Base App after admitting he was “definitively wrong” to bet on social experiences driving crypto adoption.

items.title: Coinbase's Jesse Pollak steps back from Base app leadership after admitting his crypto social strategy failed
items.summary: Pollak said that Jordan Fish, also known on X as 'Cobie,' will lead the Base app team.

items.title: DTCC moves tokenized securities into live trading, marking a milestone for Wall Street's blockchain push
items.summary: DTCC's first live production trades using tokenized securities show how blockchain could reshape the infrastructure behind Wall Street.
